===''Pokémon the Series''=== ====History==== ====={{aniseries|OS}}===== {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} first encountered Sabrina's younger self as they approached [[Saffron City]] in ''[[EP022|Abra and the Psychic Showdown]]''. Her younger version was playing in the woods where Ash was lost. He tried to chase her, but she disappeared and Ash accidentally sprinted off a cliff. Later she went on to save the group from {{TRT}}'s seemingly inescapable trap room. Ash and his friends soon realized that the young girl was in fact Sabrina when they visited the [[Saffron Gym]] for Ash's fourth [[Badge]]. Ash went on to challenge Sabrina in a one-on-one match, but {{AP|Pikachu}} was soon overwhelmed by Sabrina's [[Evolution|newly evolved]] {{TP|Sabrina|Kadabra}} and its strong {{t|Psychic}} powers. After Ash forfeited, Sabrina shrunk down and transported the group to her giant play town. [[Sabrina's father]] helped them escape before they were crushed by a ball. Afterwards, Sabrina's father recommended that Ash {{pkmn2|caught|catch}} himself a {{t|Ghost}} Pokémon to defeat Sabrina's Psychic Pokémon. The group then headed to the [[Lavender Tower]], and by the end of ''[[EP023|The Tower of Terror]]'', Ash managed to befriend a {{TP|Sabrina|Haunter}}. Sabrina was only seen during flashbacks in that episode. Sabrina reappeared in ''[[EP024|Haunter versus Kadabra]]'', where Ash had a [[rematch]] against her upon his return. However, Haunter abandoned him as soon as the challenge began, and Ash's other Pokémon were too scared to face Kadabra. {{an|Misty}} and {{an|Brock}} were subsequently transformed into dolls and placed into Sabrina's dollhouse alongside [[Sabrina's mother|her mother]], who had been stuck there for some time, while Sabrina's father managed to rescue Ash from suffering the same fate. Later, Sabrina's father formally introduced himself and explained to Ash that his daughter had developed incredibly strong psychic powers that even exceeded his own. She was able to use her psychic powers to do many things, such as {{m|teleport}}ation, {{wp|telepathy}}, {{wp|psychokinesis}}, and {{wp|transmutation}}. She soon became obsessed with perfecting them and developed two separate personalities: her younger self and her adult self. At some point, Sabrina became the Saffron City Gym Leader and her notable strengths helped her establish the Gym as a training school for practicing {{tc|Psychic}}s. Ash later reunited with Haunter and returned to the Gym once more. However, Haunter disappeared again, forcing Pikachu to battle Kadabra in its place. During the match, Haunter abruptly reappeared and started to playfully tease Sabrina. Haunter's antics delighted Sabrina so much that she was no longer able to contain her emotions and started to laugh. Her psychically-linked Pokémon joined along as well. This caused her two personalities to merge back into one, and as a result of this incapacitation, Ash won the {{Badge|Marsh}}. Afterwards, Haunter chose to stay with Sabrina and her reunited family. ====={{aniseries|JN}}===== Sabrina's silhouette appeared in ''[[JN018|Destination: Coronation!]]'' alongside the other Kanto Gym Leaders as the [[narrator]] explained how the Gym Leader system works in the [[Pokémon world]]. ====Character==== As Sabrina's psychic powers increased, she grew more obsessed with developing them. She also became less emotional, using her abilities for destructive purposes. This caused a deep psychological rift, and the emotions she tried to shut off developed into a separate personality: a young girl who manifested as a puppet around Sabrina. Sabrina's mind was then divided into the cold, callous woman with a thirst for power and the little girl who just wanted to have fun. Prior to befriending {{TP|Sabrina|Haunter}}, Sabrina was a menacing and strong [[Gym Leader]]. She was shown to be able to telepathically command her {{TP|Sabrina|Kadabra}}. However, her lighthearted nature was seen briefly at the end of ''[[EP024|Haunter versus Kadabra]]''. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Sabrina's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: =====On hand===== {| width="100%" |- | {{ActivePoké|Sabrina|Kadabra|Sabrina Kadabra.png|Psychic|fir=Abra|size=200px}} | | |- |} =====Befriended===== {| width="100%" |- | {{ActivePoké|Sabrina|Haunter|Sabrina Haunter.png|Ghost|Poison|size=200px}} | | |- |} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{psychic color}}|bordercolor={{psychic color light}} |ja=荒木 香恵 ''Kae Araki'' |en=[[Lisa Ortiz]] |ar=امال سعد الدين ''Amal Saad Eddin'' |cs=Jana Páleníčková |fi=Minna Tasanto |it=Laura Brambilla (Mediaset dub)
